AboutSection.heading: Nicolai Marlon Schirmer
AboutSection.description: Creative Full Stack Developer focused on delivering smooth, user centered web experiences that make a real impact. With a solid background in Computer Science and practical expertise in modern technologies, I work well in team settings and am always eager to embrace new challenges.

MoreInfoData.heading: A bit about me
MoreInfoData.paragraph1: I'm a junior developer passionate about crafting accessible, intuitive user interfaces that blend thoughtful design with robust engineering. My favorite work lies at the intersection of design and development.
MoreInfoData.paragraph2: My journey into tech, yet young, is fueled by a desire to learn, innovate, and contribute to projects that make a difference.
MoreInfoData.paragraph3: In the past, I've had the opportunity to develop software across various settings, ranging from integrating into a working consumer product to building projects from scratch.

Projects.description: Here are some projects I've worked on.

pokecompanion.title: PokéCompanion
pokecompanion.description: A final year project with integrated AI functions focused on creating a comprehensive Pokédex and Teambuilder web app.

fibwi.title: Fullstack Engineer
fibwi.description: At Fibwi, I was responsible for developing and maintaining both the frontend and backend of our web applications. I collaborated closely with designers and other backend developers to create seamless and responsive user experiences. My work involved implementing new features, optimizing performance, and ensuring cross-browser compatibility, while also contributing to the overall architecture and design of our systems.
